text: Your laugh makes my heart melt every single time.
You make terrible puns and I love you for it anyway.
You're my favorite person to do absolutely nothing with.
You remember how I take my coffee and it makes me feel so seen.
The way you light up when you talk about things you love.
You somehow manage to be cute, funny, and wildly distracting all at once.
You listen like nothing else in the world matters.
You sing in the shower and I pretend to hate it but I really, really love it.
Because you're you — and that's more than enough for me.
You make ordinary days feel like something I'll remember forever.
You've seen me at my worst and somehow still think I'm worth it.
You have a genuinely unhinged amount of energy before 8am and somehow it's endearing.
The small things you do, just to make me smile — you don't even realize you do them.
You take up exactly the right amount of space in my life.
